title: Verification-domain certificate profiles for finite multi-objective optimisation
description: Exact rational verification-domain profiles, minimum-budget certificates, structured separation oracles, exact augmented-Chebyshev intervals and retained computational evidence for positive scalarisation certificates in finite multi-objective optimisation. Version 2.0.1 is a post-deposit archival and metadata correction release of the version 2.0.0 verification-domain profile framework. It preserves the scientific case grid and exact retained evidence while correcting release identifiers, repository metadata and post-deposit validation policy. Source code is licensed under BSD-3-Clause. Retained instances, proof objects, results, figures and prose documentation are licensed under CC BY 4.0. Exact classifications and proof-object replay are validated by the included scripts. Independent physical-machine replication is encouraged and can be recorded using docs/INDEPENDENT_REPLICATION.md.
